category_title: High-achieving Latino students who disassociate from academic labels through mischief
scenario_title: Reading comprehension passages and advanced questioning
minimal_context: José is assigned to read a passage about dinosaurs and oil and complete the corresponding questions during language arts class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: José, please read this passage about dinosaurs and oil, and then complete the corresponding questions.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Taps his pencil on the desk) I'm done with the questions. I'm going to visit with my classmates.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to check your work first. Let's look at the passage.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: How does oil get in the ground?

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's read the passage together to find the answer.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Starts stomping his feet and gets up to walk around the room) Oh, I didn’t ever read it. I was just faking...

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: José, please read this passage about dinosaurs and oil, and then complete the corresponding questions.

STUDENT: (Taps his pencil on the desk) I'm done with the questions. I'm going to visit with my classmates.

TUTOR: We need to check your work first. Let's look at the passage.

STUDENT: How does oil get in the ground?

TUTOR: Let's read the passage together to find the answer.

STUDENT: (Starts stomping his feet and gets up to walk around the room) Oh, I didn’t ever read it. I was just faking...
